response.content: {"description": "A large-diaphragm condenser studio microphone with a cylindrical champagne/satin-silver metal body. The upper capsule section features a fine woven mesh grille in a darker silver-gray tone. The body displays a circular logo emblem and the text 'PHANTOM classic' in elegant serif lettering, with 'Nr. 1307' engraved near the base. The microphone is mounted in a silver elastic shock mount cradle with a black circular pop filter attached via a gooseneck arm positioned to the right.", "consistencyTag": "silver-condenser-studio-microphone"}
